choice: Match each returned position to an existing kind-a Holding by ticker within that Account; a matched position updates the share QUANTITY (9b7cc94d) with the sync's as-of stamp. Route unknown tickers and absent-from-feed holdings through the SAME reconciliation/unknown-ticker handling already decided for CSV (csv-matching-unknowns / csv-reconciliation), shown in the preview before commit — i.e. one ingestion reconciliation path shared by CSV and sync, not a second one. Cash/sweep balances land in a kind-c cash Holding (ba4654aa).
rationale: E*TRADE positions are inherently ticker+quantity, which is exactly the kind-a storage shape (9b7cc94d), so quantity updates fall out naturally. CSV already had to solve unknown-ticker and missing-row reconciliation; sync faces the identical problems, and reusing that machinery keeps preview semantics consistent and avoids inventing a parallel matcher.
